---
title: "GC_Collate_Data_CO2xNxPhrag"
author: "Brenden Blakley"
date: "2025-08-25"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(ggpattern)

```

```{r , echo=FALSE}

CH4_processed_files <- c("Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xNxPhrag_Porewater_CH4_202507_1.csv", "Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xNxPhrag_Porewater_CH4_202507_2.csv")
data_CH4 <- map(CH4_processed_files, read.csv)

# Combining Files
df_combo <- bind_rows(data_CH4)
```

## Visualize Data
```{r Visualize Data, echo=FALSE}
cat("Visualize Data")

### Ammonia 
CH4_forplot <- df_combo

color1 <- c("P1", "P2", "P3", "P4")
color2 <- c("P5", "P6", "P7", "P8")
color3 <- c("P10", "P9", "P11", "P12")


CH4_forplot <- CH4_forplot %>%
  mutate(Treatment1 = ifelse(
    CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
      N_Treatment == "Amended",
    "eCO2 & eN",
    ifelse(
      CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
        N_Treatment == "Ambient",
      "eCO2 & aN",
      ifelse(
        CO2_Treatment == "Ambient" &
          N_Treatment == "Amended"  ,
        "aCO2 & eN" ,
        "aCO2 & aN"
      )
    )
  )) %>%
  mutate(Treatment = ifelse(SubPlot == "A", ifelse(
    CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
      N_Treatment == "Amended",
    "eCO2_eN_A",
    ifelse(
      CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
        N_Treatment == "Ambient",
      "eCO2_aN_A",
      ifelse(
        CO2_Treatment == "Ambient" &
          N_Treatment == "Amended"  ,
        "aCO2_eN_A" ,
        "aCO2_aN_A"
      )
    )
  ), ifelse(
    CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
      N_Treatment == "Amended",
    "eCO2_eN_B",
    ifelse(
      CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
        N_Treatment == "Ambient",
      "eCO2_aN_B",
      ifelse(
        CO2_Treatment == "Ambient" &
          N_Treatment == "Amended"  ,
        "aCO2_eN_B" ,
        "aCO2_aN_B"
      )
    )
  )))  %>%
  mutate(CO2_Treatment = ifelse(CO2_Treatment == "Ambient", "aCO2", "eCO2"))  %>%
  mutate(N_Treatment = ifelse(N_Treatment == "Ambient", "aN", "eN")) %>%
  mutate(
    Plot_Color = case_when(
      Plot %in% color1 ~ "Color1",
      Plot %in% color2 ~ "Color2",
      Plot %in% color3 ~ "Color3"
    )
  )
   

CH4_forplot <- CH4_forplot[order(CH4_forplot$Depth_cm), ]
  
viz_CH4_plot_v2 <- ggplot(data = CH4_forplot, aes(
  x = as.factor(CO2_Treatment),
  y = CH4_Conc_uM,
  fill = as.factor(Treatment),
  color = as.factor(Treatment),
  pattern = as.factor(Treatment)
)) +
  geom_bar_pattern(
    stat = "identity",
    position = position_dodge2(padding = 0.25, preserve = "single"),
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.1,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.025,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_grid(Depth_cm ~ N_Treatment, scales = "fixed") +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "eCO2_eN_A" = "#DB5461",
    "eCO2_aN_A" = "#454ADE", 
    "aCO2_eN_A" = "white",
    "aCO2_aN_A" = "white",
    "eCO2_eN_B" = "#DB5461",
    "eCO2_aN_B" = "#454ADE", 
    "aCO2_eN_B" = "white",
    "aCO2_aN_B" = "white"
  ),
    name = "Treatment:",
    breaks = c("eCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_eN_B", "eCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_eN_B"),
    labels = c("eCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_eN_B", "eCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_eN_B")
    
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
     "eCO2_eN_A" = "#DB5461",
    "eCO2_aN_A" = "#454ADE", 
    "aCO2_eN_A" = "#DB5461",
    "aCO2_aN_A" = "#454ADE",
    "eCO2_eN_B" = "#DB5461",
    "eCO2_aN_B" = "#454ADE", 
    "aCO2_eN_B" = "#DB5461",
    "aCO2_aN_B" = "#454ADE"
  ),
    name = "Treatment:",
    breaks = c("eCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_eN_B", "eCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_eN_B"),
    labels = c("eCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_eN_B", "eCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_eN_B")
    
  ) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c(
     "eCO2_eN_A" = "stripe",
    "eCO2_aN_A" = "stripe", 
    "aCO2_eN_A" = "stripe",
    "aCO2_aN_A" = "stripe",
    "eCO2_eN_B" = "none",
    "eCO2_aN_B" = "none", 
    "aCO2_eN_B" = "none",
    "aCO2_aN_B" = "none"
  ),
    name = "Treatment:",
    breaks = c("eCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_eN_B", "eCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_eN_B"),
    labels = c("eCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_aN_A", "aCO2_eN_A", "eCO2_eN_B", "eCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_aN_B", "aCO2_eN_B")
    ) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ",
       y = "CH4 (uM)",
       title = "CO2xNxPhrag: Porewater Methane",
       fill = "CO2 Treatment:",
       color = "N Treatment:",
       pattern = "Subplot:") +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    )
  ) +
coord_flip()
print(viz_CH4_plot_v2)


```
```{r, echo = FALSE}
#make plot


viz_CH4_plot_2 <- ggplot(data = CH4_forplot, aes(x = CH4_Conc_uM, y = Depth_cm, color = Plot_Color, shape = SubPlot)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_path(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Color1" = "#FFD500",
      "Color2" = "#00D0FF",
      "Color3" = "#FF0075"
   
    ),
    labels = c("1", "2", "3")
  ) +
  facet_grid(Treatment1 ~ ., scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    x = "CH4 (uM)",
    y = "Depth (cm)",
    title = "CO2xNxPhrag: Porewater CH4 by Replicate",
    color = "Replicate"
  ) +
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(20, 40), limits = c(45, 15)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    )
  )

viz_CH4_plot_2
```
